programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Incredible Home Movies From WW2
programme.desc: How WW2 was documented by home movie makers This episode looks at how women delt with the war and how the responsibilty and credibility of women grew as the war went on

programme.title: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: In 1942 two German battle-cruisers the Scharnhorst and the Gneisenau put into a French port for repairs and became trapped there targets to be bombed at will by the RAF It was only a matter of time before they would attempt an escape Churchill ordered that the ships must not reach Germany and that they must be destroyed The plan to do so was called Operation Fuller However when the moment came to put the operation into action the plans were locked in a safe and the only man with a key was away on holiday What happened next was a series of one farcical mistake after another which allowed the two German ships to sail right up the English channel and home to Germany The programme also features Operation Eagle Claw the clandestine operation ordered by President Carter in 1980 to free the American hostages held in the Tehran embassy The newly formed Special Operations Group Delta Force began planning a daring rescue However inter-service rivalry intervened with tragic results when the American aircraft carrying the rescue teams crashed into each other in the Iranian desert

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: Vietnam Nurses
programme.desc: The untold stories of six Australian army nurses who served at the only Australian field hospital in the Vietnam War

programme.title: 13 Hours That Saved Britain
programme.desc: 13 Hours That Saved Britain explores the events of a single day 15th September 1940 - the day Churchill described as the crux of the battle a day that is now celebrated as Battle of Britain Day Dramatic colour film footage of aerial combat combined with contemporary interviews will illustrate that the events of seventy years ago still resonate with a new generation

programme.title: The Forgotten War Between Britain And The USA
programme.desc: In June 1812 the United States of America declared war on Britain and invaded its colony of Upper Canada Britain was already locked in a life and death struggle with Napoleon in Europe leaving Upper Canada poorly defended and vulnerable to attack

programme.title: Operation Valkyrie - The Plot To Kill Hitler
programme.desc: Operation Valkyrie The Plot To Kill Hitler is the definitive film on Claus Schenk Graf von Stauffenberg and the ‘Valkyrie’ conspiracy to assassinate Hitler on 20th July 1944 Produced in collaboration with the official German Foundation dedicated to the memory of the conspirators it features testimonials and eyewitness accounts from all of the aristocratic families involved in the plot including the last living conspirator to escape Hitler’s wrath and Maria Countess von Stauffenberg who knew Claus all her life

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: He just wants to get out of town and skip college in his restored Ford Mustang and she will do anything at all to join a local sorority Omega Kappa Pi which proves to be her ultimate downfall

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Farmer George is attracted to Mary Jo the nubile young woman who helps out with the chores The problem is shes in love with a scarecrow

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Young woman Suzy looks out of the window of her apartment and witnesses a man murdering a woman in the apartment directly across from hers Suzy is so traumatized by what she sees that shes rendered mute Suzy is placed in the care of Dr Trask who alas turns out to be the man who committed the murder she witnessed

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: An actress complicates an investigation when she tries to play detective in a real life case

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A Nazi scientist uses a cursed amulet to bring a Nazi colonel back to life in order to kill Jack and his old army buddies

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Gilligan is bitten by a rare deadly insect The Professor informs him that he has 24 hours left to live

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: While The Professor tries to round up enough metal to make an anchor for a raft with an SOS message attached to it Gilligan reels in a World War II underwater mine from the lagoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: An aging and nomadic Arapaho Indian Chief insists that he can repay the McCoys kindnesses by doing an extended sequence of dances that will bring much-needed rain

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George is the perfect houseguest for all the McCoys - except Grampa

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is moonlighting as a private investigator when cutbacks hit CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS can send out sonic booms at will and threatens New York City with one

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gives away Ed to a prospective client in order to secure a home architecture job

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Eds having paternal feelings so he talks Wilbur into adopting a little pony as a son for him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While awaiting word to complete a sabotage mission Stalag 13 gets a new officer under Klink - Burkhalters alert brother-in-law who enjoys tormenting prisoners

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In using Schultz to deliver radio parts to the underground Hogan causes a marital tiff which to fix requires getting Klink to believe that his sergeant is dying from premature old age

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When a Combat Photographer is assigned to the 73 to get some footage of the Crew in action Gruber borrows his movie camera to use in a money-making scheme Then when complications develop McHale and The Boys must work up a plan to avoid trouble for both themselves and the Photographer

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys scheme to get rid of a troublesome new member of the 73 Crew and in the process wind up in big trouble But the new Crewman - Who happens to be the spitting-image of Binghamton - Turns out to be quite useful in a complicated plan to get them off the hook

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his platoon engage in war games against a rival unit and Pvt Pyle ends up captured and a prisoner of war

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sergeant Carter orders Pyle to take a week long furlough but instead of going back home to Mayberry Pyle takes a civilian job on base so he can remain close to the Sergeant

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Daredevil Shara Stanleys drunken mechanic Bill Woods tries to talk her out of a dangerous stunt because her beneficiaries plan to sabotage it and have her killed so they can collect on her insurance

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jonathan buys Jennifer a gorgeous old car for her birthday she is less than thrilled -- but two Brits seem suspiciously eager to take it off her hands

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stef and Michael plan to go to Morocco when Stef and Joanna become best friends Stef wants her and Dick to go too Dick was there in the Army and got sick from the food and doesnt want to go but Joanna talks him into going

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Larry runs for mayor

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch and Ryan investigate the disappearance of Teague with the help of a man who claims to have been tracking aliens for several years and knows that they are here on Earth planning world domination

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy interrupt a debtor and two maids who are getting hands-on with their job A confrontation with construction workers goes bad and somebodys vehicle will get destroyed

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia try to repossess a car from a yuppie with a flair for the arts and for mayhem Sonia Matt and Froy reclaim some unusual equipment from an overgrown hippie with some long hair and a short temper and Matt and Sonia interrupt a house party to ask for a vehicle but soon find themselves fighting for their lives against a troupe of enraged fire dancers

programme.title: Beverely Hills Brats
programme.desc: A rich young boy arranges to be kidnapped so hell get more attention from his parents

programme.title: The Retrievers-1
programme.desc: The Retrievers-1

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Uncle Jesse reconvenes the Ridge Raiders when he learns that Boss has misappropriated funds for a senior citizens center to build a strip club But when other members of the Ridge Raiders resort to questionable tactics - such as bombing old moonshine stills - Jesse convinces them there are other ways to protest Boss actions

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A Taelon program offers a transformation into a younger healthier version of oneself Liam fears that something more dangerous is also happening Lili is worried that Doors run for the presidency is negatively affecting the resistance

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A noted scientist and old friend of Suzannes Dr Erik Von Deer is being brain-washed through signals subliminally implanted in the music of his favorite artist into secretly working on a serum that will give the aliens immunity to Earths bacteria Suzanne arrives for a weekend visit while Von Deer is on the verge of the serums completion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A sickly stranger claiming to be Tressas long-lost brother appears at the Langford house

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Jim befriends a little girl with volatile behavior

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: Space1999

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A lonely maiden woman in her mid 40s is stalked and targeted by a psychotic drifter Meanwhile she has a long term affair with a Canadian political leader Stone and Keller need to solve several mysteries

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A top mob leader Frank Wayne is endangering the US economy Phelpss plan attacks Wayne on various fronts First the IMF watches as Jimmy Bibo one of Waynes associates is forced to dig his own grave The IMF has a doctor ready to revive Bibo -- if Waynes killer leaves the scene in time Second Phelps has a cover as an ambitious prosecutor on Waynes trail Finally Rollin is ready to take Waynes place But once Rollin has made the switch other mob bosses want Wayne to leave the country -- which will ruin the complicated plan

programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Working at a remote construction site Dr Kimble tries protect a coworker with a low IQ from being lynched when the caring married woman whos been teaching him to read is assaulted by an unknown attacker

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes partner leaves on private business When he doesnt return Cheyenne follows him to determine what happened Cheyenne finds him in jail where he is shot Cheyenne finds himself in a mess related to an estate and lawyer

programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Embryo
programme.desc: A twisted scientist performs an experiment on a human foetus to accelerate growth from a foetus into an adult in just a few days The experiment results in a beautiful 22-year-old woman who falls in love with her creator

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: A Real American Hero

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.desc: In 1945 the fate of Viennas famous Lipizzaner stallions hangs into balance American general Patton could save them but first he asks to see them perform

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: The Malik Spellman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man in 1992 who helped to end the Rodney King riots

programme.title: The K Victoria Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Carribbean superstar K Victoria Hear how shes changing the world with her music

programme.title: The Tim Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Sherard sits down with the man who has turn comedy into an art

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Computer calculations give Zartan Omega as the probable location of Audric This planet is covered with blue light from the red dwarf sun and grows only giant flowers Upon reaching it though they discover Monster Minds have set up a satellite

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM has a drilling vehicle called The Magma Mole that they are using to burrow beneath Tokyo to create devastating floods

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: After Matt Trakkers sailing ship catches fire unexpectedly MASK decides to investigate a soon to be opened amusement park on a Greek island

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Evil Spirit Revives

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Portrait of Betrayal

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: During the Simon Belmont Awards the Poltergeist King says that Trevor Belmont who is Simon Belmonts grandfather is a coward which makes Simon worried until him and Captain N get advice from a wizard

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: After playing a riddle game Captain N Princess Lana and Simon get a call from Mayor Squaresly that Tetris is in trouble so they go and check it out while the Puzzle King plans to rule Tetris

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents sabotage a US space shuttle by planting a bomb on board Inspector Gadget foils MADs plans and saves the space shuttle Safety Tip Breakfast is the most important meal of the day

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: While on a trip in Africa Inspector Gadget Penny and Brain suspect that MAD agents are using wild animals to scare off villagers and set up a crime base in the jungle Inspector Gadget investigates the situation Safety Tip Be prepared when you go exploring

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: When a giant robot designed to protect humanity from the Renegades turns against its creators the Renegades are quick to take advantage of the situation

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Dr Frost and his nephew invent a device that can alter the Earths weather and Cy-Kill snatches it to plunge the Earth into a permanent ice age
